## UserLibrary.UserLibrary class

Aggregates user-specific data libraries.

Unlike ChocolateLibrary (shared data), UserLibrary contains only user/installation-specific data with no built-in collections.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class UserLibrary implements IUserLibrary 
```
**Implements:** [IUserLibrary](./ts-chocolate.userlibrary.iuserlibrary.md)
